caption: In a spacious indoor hall with a blue carpeted floor and ornate chandeliers, three practitioners perform martial arts routines. One person wears a bright yellow traditional suit, while two others wear blue outfits. In the first sequence, the person in yellow holds a long staff, preparing a move, while a person in a light blue outfit stands behind them and another in dark blue stands to the right. As the sequence progresses, the person in yellow raises the staff high above their head before swinging it downward and forward in a sweeping motion. Simultaneously, the practitioners in blue shift their stances and movements, with the person in dark blue adjusting their position and the person in light blue moving slightly. The background is filled with a seated audience watching the demonstration. No on-screen text or logos are visible throughout the scenes.
